name: Poached Pears with Cinnamon
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup dry red wine or grape juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the pears about two-thirds of the way down from the stem, leaving the upper one-third and trimming the bottoms so they sit flat.
2. Mix together the sugar and cinnamon in a medium saucepan over medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
3. Place the pears in the pan without them touching the liquid, bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and cover the pan.
4. Simmer until the pears are soft. Carefully remove with a slotted spoon along with the cinnamon stick.
5. Reduce the liquid until it is syrupy. Serve the pears topped with the syrup.
